# Support

## Community and project support

- Discord: https://discord.gg/w8SsYu9pUT
- GitHub Issues: https://github.com/nathcymru/CiCwtch/issues
- Documentation: `docs/`

## When to use each route

- **GitHub Issues**: bugs, feature requests, and tracked project work.
- **Discord**: community discussion, early design conversations, and contributor coordination.
- **Security-sensitive matters**: do not post publicly; use a private route first.
